voters.name: Amanda
voters.comment: My mom had our house exorcised and a cross put in the wall when I was a kid. Jess claimed she saw a lady in white robes and white hair standing at the foot of her bed. On later seeing photos of my mom's mom she said that was her in her hospital gowns after she was institutionalized. I never met her, she died before I was born of a heart attack and Jessica met her once or twice I think. I figure now Jess was just fucking with me like her and her childhood friend performing seances. But my dad's girlfriend now says she senses a presence all these years later.
